title: Creamy Mexican Avocado Crumble
description: A tangy, light dish perfect for date nights featuring free-range eggs beaten and fried with avocado, served on a bed of steamed vegetables.
instructions: Blend free-range egg with half of the lime juice, dijon mustard, and yogurt until smooth.
Mash avocado in a separate bowl.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add mashed avocado, seasoning with remaining lime juice, stir for about 2 minutes.
Fold beaten eggs into the pan, cook until almost set, then fold onto cooled side of crumble and allow to cool slightly.
Season vegetables with salt and pepper, steam lightly.
Garnish with avocado and green beans on top.
